T0367.title: Shill Player
T0367.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“扎毛人”指赌场雇佣的托儿，通过假装参赌烘托气氛，引诱真实赌客下注。
T0367.description: These shills are typically paid based on their effectiveness, blending in with real gamblers to create the illusion of winning and drive betting momentum, energizing a slow table. They bear no real financial risk, as the house covers their losses and they receive a cut of any winnings. In pig-butchering scams or mobile gambling stalls, shills are a core tool for manufacturing a false sense of fairness and opportunity, leading victims to believe the game is winnable.
